title: AsterDEX - Open App
meta_description: asterdex opens the official Aster app for privacy-focused perpetual markets across crypto, stocks and commodities.
hero_h2: Open the privacy-first perps trading app
hero_lead: asterdex routes traders to the official Aster app for privacy-focused perpetual markets across crypto, stocks, commodities and other on-chain trading venues.
what_is: Aster is a privacy-first perpetual futures exchange where positions, orders and trading activity are designed to stay private from other market participants. The Aster docs describe perpetual markets across crypto, stocks and commodities, plus spot and earn products.

how.d: Use the official Aster trading route and verify the domain before connecting or logging in.
Pick a crypto, stock or commodity perpetual, then choose the trading mode that fits your workflow.
Check network, collateral, margin, leverage and liquidation details before placing any order.
Monitor open orders, funding, liquidation levels and exits directly inside the trading app.

points.p: Aster describes encrypted orders, hidden trading activity and Aster Chain infrastructure in its official documentation.
The app references support across networks including BNB Chain, Arbitrum, Ethereum and Solana; verify deposits against the official route and the BNB Chain ecosystem when using BNB Chain assets.
Before connecting a wallet or funding an account, compare the live URL with Aster's official links page.

faq.a: asterdex is the search term traders use for Aster, a privacy-first decentralized exchange focused on perpetual futures trading.
This landing page is not the official app; it routes visitors to Aster's official trading app at asterdex.com.

faq.q: Which markets can I trade on asterdex?
faq.a: Aster describes perpetual markets across crypto, stocks and commodities, with spot and earn products also covered in its documentation.
Aster positions itself around privacy-focused trading features such as hidden or encrypted orders; confirm current mode availability in the app before trading.

faq.q: Do I need a wallet for asterdex?
faq.a: Aster documentation includes Web3 wallet and email login paths; always check access rules, supported networks and transaction risk before funding an account.

footer_note: Not the official app; verify asterdex.com before connecting. Educational content only, not financial advice.
